arcs.title: The Duck Bandit
arcs.summary: A witness, Mrs. Edna Prewett, observed the Bandit at 2 a.m.: older muddy Jeep, waterproof jacket covered in duck insignia, practised and unhurried. Three trail-keepers confirm the same vehicle has been tracking Christine's recent destinations — not following, but anticipating. Day 5 should deliver the identity reveal or a final confrontation: who is the Bandit, what is the game, and what is the last duck actually for?

arcs.title: The Third Fold
arcs.summary: New arc opening quietly: Steve's map has a third fold at a ridgeline north-northwest of Heron Shelf, listed on enchanted charts as 'Disputed (Atmospheric).' The fold is already on a flat page. Christine has walked past the map twice without comment. Day 2 should cover the briefing — and whether 'Disputed (Atmospheric)' turns out to mean weather, magic, or something Steve already knows about and is building up to.
